=== bd98-09-26.txt

===================
Bob Dylan, 9/26/98, Shoreline Amphitheater, Mountain View, CA, 2CDR

(72min+10min), CSHEB>D100, 20th row directly back from left speakers; 48k dat > otari cdr18 > master cdrs > ultraplex > eac secure mode > wav > cooledit2000 > constant amp > wav > shn; excellent sound [A]

CD1
1 Leopard-Skin Pill-Box Hat, 2 License To Kill, 3 Can't Wait, 4 Simple Twist Of Fate, 5 It Takes A Lot To Laugh, It Takes A Train To Cry, 6 Silvio, 7 Roving Gambler (acoustic), 8 It's All Over Now, Baby Blue (acoustic), 9 Tangled Up In Blue (acoustic), 10 Make You Feel My Love, 11 'Til I Fell In Love With You, 12 Love Sick 

CD2
1 Rainy Day Women #12 & 35, 2 Blowin' In The Wind (acoustic)
